texto: There's a place for doctrine and dogma, and science and history and apologetics, but, these things are not Jesus - they are humanly manufactured attempts to make people think that having the right ideas is the same thing as loving and following Jesus.
explicacao: Citação de Carl Medearis sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “There's a place for doctrine and dogma, and science and history and apologetics, but, these thing…” articula reflexao, christianity, jesus em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como jesus.
